positive: A maximalist, highly detailed celestial botanical wreath framing a central, glowing stylized mountain silhouette. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, designed for a circular central placement. Elements include glowing constellations rendered in gold foil texture, intertwined dark jungle vines with oversized, luminous floral blooms (such as stylized peonies and monstera leaves), and scattered crystalline dust particles. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco symmetry, deep engraving etching, and vibrant bioluminescence. Use a deep indigo and midnight blue palette accented by metallic gold and jade green. Strong contrast, crisp lines, and a central point of magical focus. High-resolution, clean vector illustration quality, symmetrical, studio lighting.
